doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such protocol exists, and the State Bar's Legal Services Trust Fund Commission has no authority to waive UPL under Business & Professions Code §6125.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" exists; the State Bar/LSTFC cannot waive UPL under §6125, and the described non-attorney drafting authority contradicts California law.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such protocol exists, and the State Bar's Legal Services Trust Fund Commission has no authority to waive UPL under Business & Professions Code §6125.
